title: 16 Panel Story Illustration Cute Rounded Picture
sourceTitle: 16 Panel Story Illustration Cute Rounded Picture

imagePrompts.prompt:
A 16-panel story illustration in a cute, rounded picture-book art style, featuring warm and soft color tones. The main characters are a clever multicolored tabby cat with a clear white heart-shaped marking centered on its forehead, and an adorable round-faced blue cat.

The storyboard unfolds as follows: at first, the tabby cat is curled up asleep with its eyes closed, while the blue cat keeps changing poses in an attempt to wake it up. The blue cat lightly taps the tabby’s ears with its paw, rolls around beside it to create a disturbance, and leans in close to meow loudly. After being mischievously interrupted three times in a row, the tabby cat finally opens its eyes sleepily. The two kittens then happily chase each other around a cozy room, creating a lively sense of movement and warmth throughout the scene.
Try it on
